Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "try { $ws = New-Object System.Net.WebSockets.ClientWebSocket; $ct = New-Object System.Threading.CancellationTokenSource; $ct.CancelAfter\(3000\); $ws.ConnectAsync\([Uri]''ws://127.0.0.1:18789'', $ct.Token\).Wait\(\); $ws.State } catch { $_Exception.Message }")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference=''Stop''; try { $ws = New-Object System.Net.WebSockets.ClientWebSocket; $cts = New-Object System.Threading.CancellationTokenSource; $cts.CancelAfter\(3000\); $task = $ws.ConnectAsync\([Uri]''ws://127.0.0.1:18789'', $cts.Token\); $task.Wait\(\); $ws.State } catch { $_Exception.Message }")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@156.226.168.206 "set -euo pipefail; echo ''== OS =='' ; lsb_release -a || cat /etc/os-release; echo ''== Disk =='' ; df -h /; echo ''== CPU/Mem =='' ; nproc; free -h; echo ''== Existing tools =='' ; \(docker --version || true\); \(docker compose version || true\); \(git --version || true\); \(curl --version | head -n 1 || true\); ls -la /opt || true")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@156.226.168.206 "cd /opt/topivra && sed -n ''1,240p'' docker-compose.yml")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@156.226.168.206 "cd /opt/topivra && ls -la config/nginx && sed -n ''1,220p'' config/nginx/nginx.prod.https.conf")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@156.226.168.206 "cd /opt/topivra && sed -n ''1,200p'' config/nginx/nginx.prod.http.conf")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@156.226.168.206 "cd /opt/topivra && curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w ''%{http_code} %{url_effective}\\n'' http://127.0.0.1/health && curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w ''%{http_code} %{url_effective}\\n'' http://127.0.0.1/api/v1/health || true")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@156.226.168.206 "curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w ''%{http_code}\\n'' http://127.0.0.1:8000/health || true; curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w ''%{http_code}\\n'' http://127.0.0.1:8000/health/liveness || true; curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w ''%{http_code}\\n'' http://127.0.0.1:8000/health/readiness || true; curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w ''%{http_code}\\n'' http://127.0.0.1:8000/health/liveness || true")
